faqs.question: Are NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admissions entrance-based?
faqs.answer: No, NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admissions are not entrance-based. Students looking to get into the institute need to simply fulfil the eligibility criteria specified. The institute admits students based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Hence, no entrance is required. Aspiring candidates can simply walk-in with the required documents and go through the admission process as explained by the institute.

college_info.intro:
The vibrant range of programs at NIF Global, Bhubaneswar are offered to students in mainly 3 core areas: Fashion Designing, Interior Designing, and School of Beauty. The popular courses include the Bachelor of Design (BDes), Bachelor of Vocation (BVoc), and the Diploma in Makeup and Hair Design. These form the basic foundation of training that equips the student to seek careers in the design or beauty industries. The Interior Designing programs at New York Institute of Fashion, Bhubaneswar are offered across 5 professional levels, ranging from the Foundation to the Executive Program.
For more information regarding NIF Global, Bhubaneswar popular courses, students can check the details provided below:

admission_overview.college_name: NIF Global, Bhubaneswar Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admission 2025is now open. The college offers courses, including BDes, BVoc, BBA and MVoc, at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels. In addition to these, the college offers several Foundation, Advanced, Specialisation, Super Specialisation, and PG Certificate programmes. To gain admission toNIF Global, Bhubaneswar, students must meet the institute's eligibility criteria. The college offers courses under three schools, including Fashion Designing, Interior Designing and the School of Beauty. The application process at college is conducted online.

NIF Global, Bhubaneswar course admissionis made based on preset admission criteria, which students need to satisfy to get a seat at the institute. The basic eligibility for UG courses is to pass Class 12, whereas PG admissions require students to complete graduation. Further, the selection process of the institute is merit-based. Interested students can check out the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularNIF Global, Bhubaneswar courses:

Candidates looking to join any of the courses offered at NIF Global, Bhubaneswar, need to complete a multi-step admission process. The process starts with application, followed by selection, and admission confirmation. Students applying for admission must satisfy the eligibility criteria of the desired programme. Interested students can follow the steps explained below to completeNIF Global, Bhubaneswar admission process:
Interested students can go to the official website of NIF Global Pune Kondhwa and fill out the application form by providing the required details.

Selection of students are based on their academic merit. Aspirants fulfilling the eligibility criteria of the offered course. NIF Global, Bhubaneswar, will shortlist students who meet the admission parameters.
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allow and confirm the seat candidates are required to payNIF Global, Bhubaneswar feeat the admission receipt centre.

faqs.answer: Any candidate who has completed her/his Higher Secondary (10+2) education is eligible to apply for the diverse collection of courses at New York Institute of Fashion, Bhubaneswar. The students can visit the official website of NIF Global, Bhubaneswar and familiarize themselves with the syllabus, duration, and fees structure of their preferred courses. Hence, there is no specialised academic or experience requirement as such for admissions into New York Institute of Fashion, Bhubaneswar.

faqs.question: Are NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admissions entrance-based?
faqs.answer: No, NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admissions are not entrance-based. Students looking to get into the institute need to simply fulfil the eligibility criteria specified. The institute admits students based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Hence, no entrance is required. Aspiring candidates can simply walk-in with the required documents and go through the admission process as explained by the institute.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at NIF Global, Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Yes,NIF Global, Bhubaneswar admissions are openfor the academic year 2025-26. Students interested in joining any of the courses offered at the college may visit its official website to apply online. Before applying, candidates need to complete the multi-step admission process. Students are mainly selected on a merit basis for all of the offered course. For more details, students can connect with the admission help desk of NIF Global, Bhubaneswar.

faqs.question: What is the percentage required for NIFD Global Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: NIFD Global Bhubaneswar offersseveral full-time programs, including BVoc, BDes, and other courses in Fashion Design and Interior Design. To get NIFD Global Bhubaneswar admission candidates must pass their10+2 levelare eligible. The required percentage for admission to NIFD Global Bhubaneswar courses is that the candidate must have passed the HSC or its equivalent examination and obtained at least 45%marks (at least 40%marks, in case of Backward class categories, Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Odisha State only).

reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, and average campus life. Review of BIT Jaipur.

review_content.Placements: It has a very good TNP cell, which focuses on placements and the development of the students. It has a good average for CSE and other branches and also has the alumni cell of BIT Mesra. In 2023, two 3.36-crore packages were placed from the BIT Mesra college campus of BIT Jaipur.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has IIT-level labs for all the information technology branches, well-equipped with all the instruments you need for any course. It also has an e-library with many desktops, a girls' college with good infrastructure and food, and good security.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with BIT Mesra faculty and placements.

review_content.Placements: The placement record at BIT Mesra is excellent with almost 90 percent of students getting placed. The average package is 9-10 LPA with the highest being 51 LPA and the lowest being 5 LPA. Top companies like Google, Microsoft and Deloitte hire from this college along with the usual suspects like Infosys, TCS and Wipro. Overall, this college is a great environment to grow in life.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure related to education is top-notch, with air-conditioned labs and modern machinery.Still the infrastructure related to sports is lacking as there is only a small gym with a few working machines. The canteen and mess food is good. While there is only one girls' hostel, all other students live off campus in PGs near the college within walking distance.

overview_faqs.question: Is BBA available at BIT Jaipur?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BBA is a three-year course offered at BIT Jaipur. Candidates who have completed Class 12 or equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD) along with English can apply for BBA course. Additionally, the candidates are shortlisted for BBA course based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Jaipur as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Jaipur is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, M.Sc, BBA, BCA, B.Sc, MBA/PGDM. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, IT & Software, Science, Business & Management Studies, Animation. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Jaipur boasts an impressive review rating of 3.4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.14 for Campus Life, 3.26 for Placements, 4.12 for Faculty, and 3.05 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: When was BIT Mesra Jaipur established?
overview_faqs.answer: BIT Mesra Jaipur was established in 1995 and through various departments offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD programmes to students.

review_summary.college_name: BIT Mesra Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Great course with helpful teachers, good crowd, fun fests, and strong technical learning.

content.Placements: Around 60-70 percent of students from my course got placed. The highest package is 51 LPA, the average is around 10 LPA, and the lowest is about 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, and Wipro. Around 40 percent of students got internships, mostly in companies like TCS, Infosys, and small startups. The top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, and Web Developer. However, most good placements are grabbed by students with strong skills and personal projects, not because of college support.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers good infrastructure and facilities for students. Classrooms are clean, spacious, and equipped with smart boards. The computer labs have proper systems and internet access for practical work. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and works fairly well. The library is well-maintained with a good collection of academic books and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with regular maintenance, though sometimes water issues occur. Mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen provides decent options. Medical support is available on campus, and sports facilities like a gym, football ground, and badminton court help balance student life.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements last year and great faculty .

content.Placements: The placements are above average, as last year 88 percent got placed in CSE, which is really good. The highest package was 51 lacs at Microsoft, and the lowest was 6.5, and the average package was 12 lacs for the CSE branch and 9 lacs overall. Top companies like Microsoft, Accenture, etc., come for campus placements. Software engineer, etc., are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The course here is good, but the 1st year is a little hectic, but after the 2nd semester, we get plenty of time to focus on other activities. The faculty members are very intelligent here and teach very well. Infrastructure is also fine; the labs are clean and equipped with good machines.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, and average campus life. Review of BIT Jaipur.

content.Placements: It has a very good TNP cell, which focuses on placements and the development of the students. It has a good average for CSE and other branches and also has the alumni cell of BIT Mesra. In 2023, two 3.36-crore packages were placed from the BIT Mesra college campus of BIT Jaipur.
content.Infrastructure: It has IIT-level labs for all the information technology branches, well-equipped with all the instruments you need for any course. It also has an e-library with many desktops, a girls' college with good infrastructure and food, and good security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with BIT Mesra faculty and placements.

content.Placements: The placement record at BIT Mesra is excellent with almost 90 percent of students getting placed. The average package is 9-10 LPA with the highest being 51 LPA and the lowest being 5 LPA. Top companies like Google, Microsoft and Deloitte hire from this college along with the usual suspects like Infosys, TCS and Wipro. Overall, this college is a great environment to grow in life.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure related to education is top-notch, with air-conditioned labs and modern machinery.Still the infrastructure related to sports is lacking as there is only a small gym with a few working machines. The canteen and mess food is good. While there is only one girls' hostel, all other students live off campus in PGs near the college within walking distance.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Animation Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great campus and faculty is also nice .

content.Placements: The percentage of students that got placed on campus was 70%. The highest package would be INR 11 LPA. The lowest package would be INR 4 LPA. The average package would be INR 7 LPA. Technicolor, Zee Studios, Pepperfry, etc. are top recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships. Senior 3D artist, animator, character designer, 2D artist, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi available on campus, which works fine. The labs are also well-equipped, and the library also has a book bank for students. Classrooms have AC facilities and a good computer system has also been installed. Canteen food is okayish.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in BIT Mesra Jaipur?
faqs.answer: established in the year 1995, Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra is a renowned educational institution. It is quite difficult to get admission to BIT Mesra, Jaipur, as the candidate needs to clear the JEE Mains cut-off score and after that apply for admission in JOSSA Counselling.  So, it is not very easy to get admission to such a reputable Institute.

college_info.college_name: Shrimati Indira Gandhi College, Tiruchirappalli: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for Shrimati Indira Gandhi College, Tiruchirappalli admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Technology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Really good place to learn a lot about fashion technology.

review_content.Placements: They neither conducted any campus interviews nor did we get to do internships, but they have tie-ups with some companies, so they referred us. Those are companies in Karur, Tiruppur mostly, and from Coimbatore and Chennai rarely. They offered a quality checker role where the package starts from 10k to 16k per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have sewing labs, which are good, but you cannot expect anything more. The classrooms and the library are fine. There is no Wi-Fi. The hostel is inside the campus, but it is manageable, and the food is fine. They give importance to sports events. Overall, according to the feel, it is fine.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: D Mart, CTC Company, Pronoiya Insurance Company, Sriram Finance Limited, ESAF Bank, Alas Company, Sriram Funds, etc. are the top recruiters. More placements are available here. We used the placement opportunity; it is very useful for my career. I am very happy for my departmental placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, libraries, everything is available in the department and the canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are available in this college. I enjoyed everything. It's all very useful for me and I have learned and enjoyed these two years. I am very happy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of the college is beautiful.

review_content.Placements: There is a separate department for the students' placement that helps the students with their placement process. The highest package offered by the companies is around Rs 6,00,000/- per annum for this course. The average package offered by the companies is around Rs 4,00,000/- per annum for this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides medical facilities to the students to the students free of cost. There are various types of games available for the students to play on the campus. Games like Basketball, Volleyball, Cricket, etc., are available for the students to play on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good institution thankyou

review_content.Placements: 70% percent of students are placed, highest package is 6.5lakh p.a lowest package is 3.5lakh p.a, sigc provide so many reputed companies for campus. Cub is the top most company for mba, bajaj also a top most company, business analyst and hr is the top roles
review_content.Infrastructure: This college have a good infrastructure, so many laboratories and wifi facilities lot of books was available in libraries, student gain more knowledge in these college, the quality of a food in college was good. Sports , cultural programmes also conducted by the college

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College has good placements, practical internships, workshops, seminars and guest lectures.

review_content.Placements: The highest CTC offered in this course is 6.5 LPA and the lowest CTC is 3.5 LPA. Bajaj, HCL, CUB, Cognizant, Dmart, and ESAF small finance bank are some of the top recruiters. Students got placements in operations, human resources and financial roles in the companies. 100% internships are provided to all the students. Business analyst, Operations head, Relationship Manager and Human Resources Trainee are some of the roles in which our students got placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good. The students have access to Labs and Digital libraries. The hi-tech classrooms ensures a smooth learning process for the students and assist them in all aspects. The hostel accommodation, food and water facilities are good. Wardens are friendly and approachable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with my college life with good placements and other facilities.

review_content.Placements: There are a number of students who get placed with mathematics course of UG. Our college conducts job placements by different companies which are in trending like IT, Marketing, etc. Every year our college students are getting jobs. They conduct placement classes for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college allows mobile phones for students education process. Wi-Fi connections will also be available soon. Our college has a library which has academic books, general knowledge books, course-related books, etc. Hostel life is very pleasant. They maintain hygiene while preparing food in the mess. Our college supports sports too. And all medical facilities are available inside our college. Canteen snacks and foods are good too.

reviews.review_heading: Really good place to learn a lot about fashion technology.
reviews.review_text: They have sewing labs, which are good, but you cannot expect anything more. The classrooms and the library are fine. There is no Wi-Fi. The hostel is inside the campus, but it is manageable, and the food is fine. They give importance to sports events. Overall, according to the feel, it is fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, libraries, everything is available in the department and the canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are available in this college. I enjoyed everything. It's all very useful for me and I have learned and enjoyed these two years. I am very happy.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is beautiful.
reviews.review_text: The college provides medical facilities to the students to the students free of cost. There are various types of games available for the students to play on the campus. Games like Basketball, Volleyball, Cricket, etc., are available for the students to play on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good institution thankyou
reviews.review_text: This college have a good infrastructure, so many laboratories and wifi facilities lot of books was available in libraries, student gain more knowledge in these college, the quality of a food in college was good. Sports , cultural programmes also conducted by the college

reviews.review_heading: College has good placements, practical internships, workshops, seminars and guest lectures.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. The students have access to Labs and Digital libraries. The hi-tech classrooms ensures a smooth learning process for the students and assist them in all aspects. The hostel accommodation, food and water facilities are good. Wardens are friendly and approachable.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with my college life with good placements and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college allows mobile phones for students education process. Wi-Fi connections will also be available soon. Our college has a library which has academic books, general knowledge books, course-related books, etc. Hostel life is very pleasant. They maintain hygiene while preparing food in the mess. Our college supports sports too. And all medical facilities are available inside our college. Canteen snacks and foods are good too.

college_info.college_name: D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: DGVC is a student's point of view.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is always around 60-70%, with various Chennai-based and South Indian companies like Sun TV, Vijay TV, and other well-known companies as recruiting partners. Around 70% of students secure internships, and the roles vary based on the career path each student chooses to pursue.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every necessary facility and infrastructure is available here, from well-equipped classrooms to industry-level professional studios and labs for hands-on learning. The college also provides hostel accommodation, and the food in the canteen is healthy. Students are given ample opportunities to participate in sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Above Average College for M.Sc. in Chemistry.

review_content.Placements: A placement cell at our Dwaraka Doss Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College offers 80% above placement. How much we put into our studies to obtain jobs determines where we end up. Prominent corporations include Amazon, TCS, Wipro, and others. Starting at 4.5 LPA, the highest remuneration package ranges from 14.5 to 15.5 LPA. Fifty percent of students secure internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: We appreciate our campus environment because of the pleasant college atmosphere, which also aids in our ability to concentrate on our studies. High-speed internet and the newest equipment are available in lab rooms. Every year, a festival is organized on the campus of our college. We have to pay for the great food at the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: 1st year B.Com marketing management .

review_content.Placements: Even though I'm currently in my first year, I've seen my seniors already preparing for placements. The college provides various training programs to help them get selected by top companies and conducts many workshops. They emphasize the importance of placements from the first year itself, and internships are provided in the second year.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college isn't very big, but it's clean and neat. There are two cafeterias, and the college is always crowded in the afternoon after classes end. Even the bus stop gets crowded. We have a large bike parking area. The hostel facility is only for boys, and they don't serve any non-vegetarian food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good MBA environment with good growth and experience.

content.Placements: In my MBA 2024, 2026 batch, the placement activities have been progressing steadily, and a good number of students have already received interview calls, and shortlisted companies like Assetplue, Accenture, TCS, HDFC, and EY have visited the campus offering roles in HR, finance and marketing. The highest package offer so far is around 8 to 10 Lacs, and the average package remains close to 4 Lacs to 5 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a comfortable academic environment with a smart classroom, strong Wi-Fi, a clean lab, and a well-stocked library that is useful for project work. The campus is neat, and most facilities are updated regularly. The hostel has proper security, decent rooms and regular cleaning.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Chemistry Course.

content.Placements: Recruitment is good and growing at our university. More than 75-85% of students are referred to the campus placement drives. The highest salary offered was 25 LPA. The average salary ranges from 11 LPA - 20 LPA. ICICI Bank, Deloitte, Infosys, etc., are some of the recruiters in the past. The top roles are financial analyst, economic analyst, etc. 70% of students get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is fully equipped, and the view from campus is spectacular. There are thick trees all across campus, and it is cool. Classrooms provide air conditioning, laboratories, Wi-Fi, and smart boards. Everything is operated and maintained. They are friendly. Clinics are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good MBA environment with good growth and experience.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a comfortable academic environment with a smart classroom, strong Wi-Fi, a clean lab, and a well-stocked library that is useful for project work. The campus is neat, and most facilities are updated regularly. The hostel has proper security, decent rooms and regular cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Chemistry Course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully equipped, and the view from campus is spectacular. There are thick trees all across campus, and it is cool. Classrooms provide air conditioning, laboratories, Wi-Fi, and smart boards. Everything is operated and maintained. They are friendly. Clinics are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: DGVC is a student's point of view.
reviews.review_text: Every necessary facility and infrastructure is available here, from well-equipped classrooms to industry-level professional studios and labs for hands-on learning. The college also provides hostel accommodation, and the food in the canteen is healthy. Students are given ample opportunities to participate in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Above Average College for M.Sc. in Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: We appreciate our campus environment because of the pleasant college atmosphere, which also aids in our ability to concentrate on our studies. High-speed internet and the newest equipment are available in lab rooms. Every year, a festival is organized on the campus of our college. We have to pay for the great food at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: 1st year B.Com marketing management .
reviews.review_text: My college isn't very big, but it's clean and neat. There are two cafeterias, and the college is always crowded in the afternoon after classes end. Even the bus stop gets crowded.  We have a large bike parking area. The hostel facility is only for boys, and they don't serve any non-vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Lots of culturals to attend and no restriction.
reviews.review_text: Top-class labs and classrooms. There is no free Wi-Fi, and the library is the best. In the hostel, there is no A/C, but rooms are good. There is no A/C option in the hostel. It can get very hot, and the food is vegetarian. There is no non-veg allowed on campus due to the college principles.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for Master of Commerce (M.Com.) Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is awesome with greenery, which gives us positive vibes while entering college. Our college provides a good environment. Classrooms, libraries and E-libraries are also available for information. Our college has provided us with clean and hygienic food. Hostel room is good due to maintenance which is great in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.A. in Journalism Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure, facilities are good. Our college gives us everything. Our campus has been well maintained. The bathrooms are good. The library is good. It has a lot of books. The food served in the restaurant is good, clean, and healthy. The restaurant is well maintained. Our college has facilities for sports such as basketball, kho-kho, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for M.Sc. I am happy with it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and our college is very strict; no one can enter without an ID card. All lab rooms have AC. There is a huge amount of literature available in our college library. Tasty food, medical facilities, and many other things are available. Sports and functions are arranged every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and we love it here.
reviews.review_text: The college atmosphere is nice, which is why we enjoy our campus environment, and it helps us focus on our studies. Lab rooms are available with the latest technology and high-speed internet. An annual fest is arranged every year on our college grounds. The canteen's food is delicious, but we have to pay for it.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the state.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is very nice; our full campus area is covered with so many trees and plants. Classrooms and rest rooms are very neat and clean. Lab rooms are projector-connected. full coverage area is under Wi-fi coverage. There is a large playground in there. Overall, the college provides all types of facilities like library, medical center, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is good .
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts comprehensive facilities, including Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a ground and hostel accommodation. Medical services are all well maintained in these facilities. The canteen provides food and hygiene for all students and my college has special Sunday meals available .

reviews.review_heading: Review of D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our campus is well-maintained. The restrooms are good. The library is good. It has many books. The food served in the canteen is good, hygienic, and healthy. The canteen is well-maintained. Our college provides facilities for sports like basketball, kho-kho, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I was dissatisfied two years ago, but now the college has developed and earned my respect.
reviews.review_text: The college contains labs, Wi-Fi, a big library, and a play ground with many auditoriums in each block. There are hostel facilities, a mess, and a canteen too. There is a separate auditorium for each department, and it has many indoor games and full medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has labs, a library, etc. A sports ground is available in our college. The hostel facility is available in our college. Medical facilities are available in our college. They provide sports facilities. A huge canteen is available in our college. The food served in the mess is good.

college_info.college_name: St.Michael's College, Cherthala: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding St.Michael's College, Cherthala Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and campus.

review_content.Placements: The course I'm studying doesn't give any placements, but it offers internships starting in the second year. The new FYUGP demands that from second year onwards there will be internships for students. The top role offered in my course will be research.
review_content.Infrastructure: SMC Cherthala doesn't have a boys hostel. The college is situated on 16 acres of land, and it has most of the facilities a college should have. The college has one of the largest grounds in the district. The library is big, and there's a moderately big canteen too. There's a shooting range on the college campus. The labs are big and fully equipped. There's an abundance of classrooms in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Finance - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, but it lacks infrastructure and campus programs.

review_content.Placements: There are no students in college. 9000–60000 is the package offered here. No other companies are for recruiting students. Only a few local companies offer internships. CA, ACCA manager, PG, MBA, and CMA USA are some of the top roles offered by my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good physics, chemistry and biology labs are there and there is a not-very-good computer lab too. Average classrooms, bad toilets, a very good football field, and a 400-meter athletic track are around. A well-maintained, air-conditioned seminar hall and an auditorium with a capacity of 1000 people are available.

review_summary.college_name: St.Michael's College, Cherthala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Finance - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: St.Michael's College, Cherthala is the best college.

content.Placements: Only some students get placed through college interviews. The highest salary offered is 1.5 per month and the lowest salary offered in our course is Rs. 50,000 per month. Bajaj, LIC, and other finance companies are the top recruiting companies. All students are allowed to do internships in tea factories and other private companies. The top roles offered are staff, manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi and labs are available. Classrooms are well-arranged and disciplined. The library has a lot of books and journals. The hostel is eco-friendly and low-budget. Good food is available in the canteen. Cricket, football, and athletics are the main sports and games. Medical facilities are available near the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Finance - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Honest college review of St. Michaels.

content.Placements: I don't have direct placement experience, but from what I heard from seniors, around 60 to 70 students get placed. Top recruiting companies are banks like HDFC, SBI, and Axis Bank. Students who got internships are approximately 50 to 60, either through campus or personal effort.
content.Infrastructure: My perspective on the infrastructure of the course is that the classrooms are well cleaned, with better seating and modern facilities. The library is well-stocked with lots of books on commerce, business, and finance. Computer labs are equipped with necessary software for learning tools. The cafeteria serves decent food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Software Development - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members.

content.Placements: Students get good placements in good IT companies if they have a good pass percentage. Internships are provided in the fourth semester in an IT company in which students get to learn a programming language with certification.
content.Infrastructure: Mess is not available but has a canteen. Our campus is very good. Lab is available in every department for both aided and non-aided courses. Women's hostel is provided in our college. NCC and NSS are available.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of SMC is nice & there is a big ground for practising sports and also a shooting range, which is also accessible to public (rifle club members). We have Wi-Fi in our college office, not for students. Classrooms are good enough and most of them are very old as the college is started almost 6 decades ago. And we have a Christian management there so there is also a prayer hall at the entrance. We have a double floor Library and is quite place to read books, it has a huge number o...

reviews.review_heading: St. Michael's, a heaven for +2 passout students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are pure better, and the ambiance in the college is good. Classrooms are highly beautiful with those friends and teachers. The canteen food is far better. The canteen offers noon food at 30 rupees with a good amount of price and fish dishes. And it is the best college in Alappuzha.

reviews.review_heading: St. michaels the heaven in earth.
reviews.review_text: Eventhough I donot stay in the hostel some of my friends stay at the hostel. They say the michaels hostal is good compared to the hostel they stayed when they were at old hostel back in plus 2 and also they said the food is also good. If I had to rate the hostel out of 10 I would give it 7. they also provide good medical facilities there.

college_info.intro:
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies for placements such as Movidu, Medi Assist, Raise Digital, and others. Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University students learn to select, create, and apply various appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools, including prediction and others. BTech students can become Software Developers, Software Testers, Database Administrators, and Software Engineers, or can go for other job profiles.
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University MBA students can become Managers, Business Analysts, or go for various other job profiles. Overall, JVWU is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JVWU Jaipur in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: JVWU conducts Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to various UG, PG and Diploma courses. The exam is held in online mode usually in May-June. JNEE question paper includes a total of 100 objective type questions (20 G.K. Questions and 80 subject related aptitude Questions) which is to be performed in 1 hours 30 minutes. Besides, admission in BAMS and BHMS programme is through NEET score.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. in Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.

content.Placements: JVWU is one of the best universities. I studied at this university for 4 years and passed out in 2022. It provides lots of opportunities for the future. It also offers both campus placements and non-campus placements. It provides recruitment in top educational companies like Byju's, Examadda, and many more. Approximately 70 to 75% of students got internships from this university.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

But I think there should reputed companies also come like TCS, Axis Bank and so on who should visit the campus for recruitment.

admission_overview.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University admissionsare both merit or entrance-based. The university offers admission direct based on merit, through the university cum scholarship exam or via scholarship exam. JVWU conducts theJNEE or Joint National Entrance Examination,for regular courses.

Candidates can also get admission through Management/ NRI Quota.JVWUoffers UG, PG, and diploma courses in multiple streams, such as Arts, Science, Management, etc. The university also offers UG and PG courses in distance education. Interested candidates can apply for admission online.

Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University usually begins admission inFebruary. Candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the university. Find below the keyJVWU admissionhighlights:
Particulars
JVWU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Diploma
How to apply?
https://jvwu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

JVWU offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and diploma levels. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university offers direct merit-based admission to some of the UG and PG courses. Besides, JVWU also considers scores of the candidates in national, state or university-level entrance exams. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for topJVWU courses:

JVWU admission processbegins with registration via online mode. Candidates need to select their preferred mode of admission while filling out the application form. Below are step-wise admission details for JVWU:
STEP 1: JVWU Application Process 2025

The mode of application is both online and offline. The offline forms are attached in the prospectus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee ofINR 1,000for regular courses. The registration fee isINR 3,000for research programmes. Candidates need to pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Besides, aspirants can also collect the form offline.
STEP 2: Selection

Once registered, candidates are selected based on their mode of admission. During application, candidates need to select whether they want direct merit-based admission, through Management Quota, University scholarship exam orJNEEexam. The university conducts a Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to some of the UG and PG specialisations. For some of the courses, the university may also conduct a personal interview round for selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Counselling

The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Besides, aspirants must come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants applying for BAMS or BHMS need to participate in NEET Counselling. Selected candidates need to pay theJVWU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: JVWU BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University offers a three-year BSc in various specialisations such as Nutrition and Dietetics, Zoology, Botany, Chemistry, Psychology, etc. Besides, the university also offers a four-year BSc B.Ed programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates need to pass Class 12 with PCM/ PCBM with at least 50% aggregate for BSc B.Ed.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: For admission to a BSc programme of the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University, aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements. The applications of only the students with appropriate educational qualification is treated as valid. Hence, the students who areClass 12or equivalent examination pass with PCM/PCB subjects can apply. At the time of form filling or admission, students must hold the pass certificates. These are required for verification purposes.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Sc in Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: JVWU offers direct merit-based admission to BSc programmes. Candidates can also get admission based on JNEE score or under the management quota. To be eligible for the course, the applicant must be Class 12 pass with PCM/PCB subjects. Students who meet the eligibility requirements can visit the university's official website to register and apply.

faqs.question: Are there any management quota seats for B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University has seats under management quota as well. Aspirants can apply for admission under this quota if they meet the prescribed eligibility criteria. As per official website, the management seats are available for admission to all professional and technical courses. Aspirants seeking admission to a BSc course can get in touch with the university to gather more details.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: There areover 100 seatsat the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University for BSc courses. The seat allotment procedure is carried out based on selection procedure defined by the university.JVWU BSc seat intakevaries based on the chosen specialisation by the candidates. The highest seat count is for the BSc-B.Ed (Mathematics) programme, i.e.,50. It must be noted that the mentioned seat count is as per the official website/sanctioning body.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.A at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: There are multiple components included in theJVWU BA fee structure, such as tuition fee, caution money, etc. A few of these components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually/semesterly. faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by JVWU for admission?
faqs.answer: JVWU conductsJoint National Entrance Examinationfor admission to various UG, PG and Diploma courses. The exam is held in online mode usually inMay-June. JNEE question paper includes a total of 100 objective type questions (20 G.K. Questions and 80 subject related aptitude Questions) which is to be performed in 1 hours 30 minutes. Besides, admission in BAMS and BHMS programme is through NEET score.

faqs.question: Can I join JVWU directly?
faqs.answer: Direct merit-based admission is one of the options to get a seat in Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University courses. Candidate must have appeared Class 10/ Class 12 or graduation examination from a recognised board to get direct admission. Aspirants must check if there course is available for direct admission before applying.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in JVWU?
faqs.answer: JVWU admissionsare offered through four modes. One is through direct admission based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Others is via University Entrance cum Scholarship Exam (JNEE) or scholarship exam. Aspirants can also get admission via Management Quota. Candidates applying via Management Quota are evaluated based on their past academic records.

faqs.question: What is the fee for JVWU?
faqs.answer: JVWU fee is a sum of various components such as one-time fee, tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee differs specialisation-wise and also depends on the past academic score of the aspirants. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. placement_data.title: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.5 LPA , INR 4.6 LPA and INR 4.56 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.32 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, according to the limited data available on the official placement report, the highest package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA . Further, the top recruiter during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 was Raise Digital . Apart from this, according to JVWU overall NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 4.35 LPA and INR 4.75 LPA , respectively.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Design Lab, Language Lab, Medical Lab, Media Lab / Business Lab / Studios, Plant Tissue Culture Lab, Though Process Lab, Local Research Resource Centre

other_facilities: Centre of Internal Quality Assurance Cell

reviews.review_heading: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college had good placements in 2017, and there were excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. There was a lack of modern techniques of teaching like lack of digital classes, presentation, and so on. The hostel was also amazing, and we got the facility of Wi-Fi. Phones were not allowed, so I think that's why we were more indulged in our studies. Food served was also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and placement activity.
reviews.review_text: University provides us best facilities in every possible way. The campus is very huge and hostel rooms are also good. Here we get 24x7 Wi-Fi, water and electricity. Mess served us good quality food and menu gets changed everyday. Talking about infrastructure of department we get facilitated by I. C. T tools, Wi-Fi is available in labs and libraries. For medical facilities we are having here homeopathy, ayurveda and allopathy hospitals.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our university is good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities provided here are good. Our college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility on the campus, hostels and classrooms. The campus is eco-friendly, and the infrastructure is maintained by considering green, clean, happiness protocol. There are well-structured classrooms and libraries. E-library is provided to enhance education. The food is served for 4 times with a perfect diet, and special food is provided on weekends. There are 24x7 medical facilities. Sports and cul...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is among 10 topmost colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in the heart of the city. Jaipur is a  natural choice and preferred destination for students from different parts of the country to pursue professional educations. Separate hostel facilities are provided for girls on the campus. It has adequate high security and good discipline.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure. Teaching facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department are well-equipped. Computer labs are categorised into ERP labs, DBMS lab, etc. There are ICT classrooms and lecture halls. There is a library with computer facilities and there is a server room.  Quality of facilities in our hostel is good. There is a laundary facility, 24x7 internet facility, night attendance at respective hostels and also time to time cleaning for both rooms and washrooms. Quality of food available in the mess and cant...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities, infrastructure, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi facility in labs, ICT in the classrooms, library with technical facilities, ICT in the lecture halls and server room. Facilities like air-conditioned rooms, ducting rooms, attached and non-attached washrooms, Wi-Fi and LAN facilities 24x7, night attendance and time to time cleaning by the staffs are available in the hostel. Quality of food served to the students is good. Medical facilities are 24x7 available with an ambulance. The college provides a tea...

reviews.review_heading: Faculties were good, hostel facility was the best as the mess food was tasty.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities were good like hostel classrooms library medical sports and games. Campus was good overall 
Also there was facility of bank inside the campus and also discotheque and gym for entertainment purpose. Overall everything was good. Music room was there and teachers for every field like sports teacher and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Jayoti Vidhyapeeth Women's University is very good for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All the facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are very good. Classrooms have projectors. Medical facilities are available as they are very important. Games and sports classes are conducted every day.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is a mixture of fun and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi and smart classrooms. There are a well-furnished library, sports ground, game centre, etc. The university provides all kind of facilities. Labs are well-equipped. The campus has a huge playground and a lawn. Everything is good here, but the food served in the canteen is a little expensive. I suggest the college to focus on food prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private women's university in India. The campus is great.
reviews.review_text: The university provides the best facilities to the students in every way. The campus is very huge, and hostel rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi facilities are provided 24x7 in hostel rooms. Mess facilities are also provided for hostellers. The quality of the food served is good. The menu is changed every week. All residential facilities are provided on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A safe and disciplined women's university for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The university will provide all the required facilities. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The university provides proper sports and medical facilities. Classrooms and labs were good, but the quality of labs needs some improvement. Hostel rooms, mess and canteen facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed, the best experience. All facilities are provided under one roof.
reviews.review_text: The campus has different buildings for engineering, law and medicine. The campus is lush green. There are swings to enjoy. Playgrounds and cafeterias are available in the college. The best part is the hostel which is present on the campus. It is the safest place.

college_info.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: JVWU fee is a sum of various components such as one-time fee, tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee differs specialisation-wise and also depends on the past academic score of the aspirants. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. Below is JVWU fee for top courses:
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

There are multiple components included in the JVWU BA fee structure, such as tuition fee, caution money, etc. A few of these components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually/semesterly. Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University BA tuition fee is INR 1.5 lakh. The total course fee include other components as well. Further, the mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Yes, JVWU provides financial assistance services to students belongs to the different States of India. The scholarships are granted based on the eligibility of the concerned department. Students also receive scholarships from various government agencies such as AICTE, Department of Minority Affairs, and Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, etc.

highlights.summary: Bahra University admissions 2026-26 are open for Diploma, UG, PG, and PhD courses. Interested students can visit the official university website to apply for the respective courses. Here are some additional updates:

table.details: UGC, State Government of Himachal Pradesh, BCI, PCI

college_info.intro:
Bahra University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech students can become Mechanical Engineers, Electrical Engineers, Software Developers, and others. Bahra University Shimla Hills BTech students are taught with the help of modern and advanced knowledge. Bahra University BTech students are placed in top companies such as Radisson, ICICI Bank, HCL, NAARi, TVS TYRES, and others.
Bahra University alumni are today working in top sectors. Bahra University BSc is offered in various specialisations such as Microbiology, Forensic Science, Anthropology, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Bahra University and their respective eligibility and Bahra University fee structure:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups

The pie chart below illustrates the detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni:NOTE: The sectors involved in the 'Others' category are Sales, Quality Assurance, and Healthcare Services.

faqs.question: Who were the top recruiters at Bahra University?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to be eligible for admission to various courses at Bahra University, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the university. The institute offers courses, such as BTech, BPharma, BBA, MCA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Other than UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctoral and Diploma courses. Candidates can go through the below table for Bahra University course-wise eligibility:Course NameEligibilityBTechClass 10 and Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with PCM as subjects and minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category-40% aggregate)BPharmaClass 10 and Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths with a minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category-40% aggregate)MBABachelor's degree with minimum 50% aggregate (reserved category- 45% aggregate)MCABachelor's degree in BCA with a minimum 50% aggregate (reserved category- 45% aggregate)BBAClass 10 and Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with a minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category - 40% aggregate)BCAClass 10 and Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category-40% aggregate)
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Bahra University admission?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to BPharmacy course at Bahra University, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are merit-based + admission counsellor and candidates must pass Class 12 from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths minimum 45% aggregate. Aspirants who belong to the reserved category should complete Class 12 with a 40% aggregate. Candidates who have not completed Class 12 are not eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BPharma at Bahra University?

faqs.answer: A:    Bahra University admission to the BPharma programme is made if candidates meet the minimum eligibility requirement set by the University. For admission to the BPharma programme at Bahra University, candidates must have passed the Class 12 examination with from any recognised state/national board with PCB or Maths minimum 45% aggregtae (reserved cateogory - 40% aggregate).Bahra University BPharm admission is also offered via lateral entry for which candidate must complete Diploma in Pharmacy from recognised state board with minimum 45% aggregate (for reserved category – 40% aggregate).
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharma course admission at Bahra University?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to BTech at Bahra University candidates are required to Pass Class 10 and Class 12 ffrom any recognised state/national board with PCM as subjects and minimum 45% aggregate (reserved category-40% aggregate). Further, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exam JEE Main. But if candidate haven't taken any entrance exam, university recommend taking the Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam for admisison. After fulfillment of the eligibility criteria, candidates are required to visit the official website of the university to apply online.
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for BTech admissions at Bahra University?

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

review_content.Placements: They only give provisional placements for 3 months, and if you qualify provisional period, you get a permanent placement, but your package will be, like, 1.2 LPA. First three months, the HRs will treat you nicely, but as soon as your provisional period ends, they will get rude with you, as the responsibility of the university ends after the provisional period. They will react as if they never wanted to hire you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Very nice university give good placements.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in BPT. The highest package was 25 LPA and the lowest package was 10 LPA. Physiomate was a recurring recruiter for the course. Around 99.9% of students got internships through the course, including in international companies, one even got selected as a sports physiotherapist for the Indian cricket team.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

review_summary.college_name: Bahra University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides a good experience and good weather.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed every year. The median package is 3-4 LPA. Most percent of students get placed in the internship. Physiotherapist roles are offered in our course, and we get Dr. Prefix and a medical course from a well-reputed college.
content.Infrastructure: We have a library and Wi-Fi available in the university. The classrooms are well-furnished, and the labs have equipment. The facilities in the hostel are good, with wooden beds, clean bathrooms, and separate washrooms for each room. The mess food is also okay, and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very friendly teachers, average placements, good infrastructure, and beautiful environment.

content.Placements: Usually 60% of students get placement directly through the college. Maximum others are also able to land a good job on their own. The average package in B.Tech computer science is 8 LPA - 9 LPA, and the highest package given is 25 LPA. Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and many more are the top recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The university is sitting on the lap of mother nature and is surrounded by green lush mountains. The weather here is optimal and moderately cold. It includes one physics lab, mechanical lab, chemistry lab, physiotherapy lab, and 2 computer labs. There are multiple sports grounds and basketball court in it with a mini football ground as well. The food here is moderate. They have one dispensary and one animal dispensary.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you just want to be a graduate or postgraduate, then only come to this college.

content.Placements: They only give provisional placements for 3 months, and if you qualify provisional period, you get a permanent placement, but your package will be, like, 1.2 LPA. First three months, the HRs will treat you nicely, but as soon as your provisional period ends, they will get rude with you, as the responsibility of the university ends after the provisional period. They will react as if they never wanted to hire you.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure does not live up to the mark, especially if you are applying for Computer Science Engineering. Labs of CSE do not work most of the time, as we are using Windows 11 and the latest features on our PCs. But they are stuck on Windows 7 and 1 GB RAM computers, which cannot even handle two Chrome tabs. How will we design an AI model on these computers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very nice university give good placements.

content.Placements: About 90% of students were placed in BPT. The highest package was 25 LPA and the lowest package was 10 LPA. Physiomate was a recurring recruiter for the course. Around 99.9% of students got internships through the course, including in international companies, one even got selected as a sports physiotherapist for the Indian cricket team.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and well-ventilated classrooms with AC were available, along with a huge library accessible 24/7. Water coolers with rat control measures were provided. The hostel facilities were good for bed students, and the quality of food was good. A physiotherapy OPD was available. However, there were no canteens. Sports and games were also conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the faculty and the placement system of the college in 2024.

content.Placements: 45% of students in the BBA course are placed, with the highest package offered being 5 LPA and the lowest package at 3 LPA. Companies like Wipro are among those that came for recruitment. Only 2% of students got internships from the university. The roles offered include Executive and Human Resources Management.
content.Infrastructure: The college has classrooms, blackboards, and a library, but there is no Wi-Fi or smart boards, which makes understanding difficult. Additionally, cameras are also not available. The quality of food provided in the college mess is very poor, the mess is untidy, and the food prepared doesn't taste good.

admission_overview.college_name: Bahra University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Bahra University admissionis open for all the courses. The university offers UG, PG, diploma and Doctoral programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Pharmacy and others.Bahra Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of the university. Read the below article to know more about Bahra University admission, course-wise eligibility, selection criteria, seat, fees and admission process:

Bahra University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech courses. Further, for other courses, admission is based on the last qualifying exam score and Counsellor Interaction. The table below lists courses offered at Bahra University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Check here for more to know more aboutBahra University courses:
Download:Bahra University Prospectus

Bahra University feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Bahra University seatintake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Bahra University courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Bahra University's admission process includes registration followed by a conversation with the admission counsellor. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BU:
STEP 1: Bahra University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at BU is INR 1,100.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to the courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission, followed by counsellor Interaction. The university also has the facility for provisional registration or seat booking by paying an amount of INR 10,000.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aBahra University course feeto confirm their admission.

reviews.review_text: Bahra University offers state-of-the-art infrastructures that render its campuses conducive to students' learning. This university provides its students with high-speed internet connectivity and bullet-proof IT infrastructure to facilitate academic and research endeavors. Further p...

reviews.review_heading: Really good nature and climate the whole year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good; the labs are big and well managed. Also, the classes are good for study and the Wi-Fi is not that good because of the low speed of internet and the library is open 24/7, which is a very good thing; students can study in the library anytime. The hostel food is bad because the taste is not good and the quality is also not very good. Medical facilities are available but not good. No sports or games are there in our university.

reviews.review_heading: In this, I have given a brief review of Bahra University. By reading this, one can easily understand
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi speed is very slow. In computer labs, computers hang too much, and some of them are not working. Keyboards are of low quality. Physics labs and Chemistry labs are good. The library is also good, and almost all required books are present there. Hostel facilities are average. Medical facilities are present. Food in the mess is sometimes good and sometimes bad. There is a ground to play games in front of the hostels. That is the only ground, which is a negative point. Canteens are present, in...

reviews.review_heading: Bahra university review.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the library are well-managed in my university. Classrooms are well-managed. Infrastructure is good. The hostel is well-managed by the warden, sir. Food quality is good for their state people. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are not playable there.

reviews.review_heading: All about Bahra University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, not too good. Wi-Fi of the hostel and university both don't work rightly. Also, the computers from the computer lab don't work, they arrange them for show. Classrooms are too small for 80 students. The library is good but some of the important books are not there. If you complain to them, it's a long process to get a new book.

reviews.review_heading: About my college BAHRA UNIVERSITY.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good, the classrooms are well designed and there are proper seating arrangements for the children. They have provided proper benches and tables for students to study. The facilities at the hostel are also good; they have well-maintained rooms in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Very much dissatisfied. Please do a good research before choosing a college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. In the classrooms, some seats are broken, and the Wi-Fi speed is poor. In the labs, computers often hang, and there are frequent issues, such as slow internet or malfunctioning systems. For the sports department, there is only one ground where events are held. Mess food is average—sometimes good, sometimes bad. Medical facilities are available, including a university ambulance. Hostel rooms are average, with 3-4 students sharing a room.

reviews.review_heading: NextGen faculty is the best, and the other faculty of the college is also helpfu
reviews.review_text: The course is designed to help students, and the hostel is fine, helping students manage their time efficiently. Food is prepared daily, and everything is great. Every faculty member, including non-teaching staff who help in the hostel, mess, and wardens for safety, is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Very good private university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities in our labs, making it easy to complete our work. Regarding hostels, we have Wi-Fi and attached bathrooms in every room. The quality of food in the mess is good, and we also have medical facilities available.

faqs.answer: The Electronics Engineering syllabus for the BTech degree is not the same across all colleges. Every college prefers to follow an individual coursework module that includes both theory classes and practical lab work. While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Electronics Engineering syllabus same across all colleges?

faqs.answer: The clear answer is no. The syllabus for MTech in Computer Science Engineering varies from one college to another. Every college abides by a certain coursework guideline decided by the college committee at the beginning of the academic year. Generally speaking, the syllabus includes some core subjects, elective subject choices, laboratory classes, and project work.Though the subjects might vary, the basic concepts taught in the classes are almost similar, covering all the fundamental knowledge and advanced-level CSE concepts that give you a comprehensive understanding of the field.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure, the best facilities and faculty members.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed. Many top brands of bathrooms and kitchens visit our college for placements. Almost 90% of the students from our course got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good classrooms with a fully air-conditioned facility in every room. There is a good interior and well-furnished rooms. Study table and chairs are very comfortable, good and modern. Computers facilities available for software training is good. Our college provides good quality of facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied as faculty members were helpful, but placements only depend on our skills.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Livspace, Homeland, Asian Paints, etc. Almost 100% of the students got an internship from the batch. The role offered is to design the best homes to satisfy the client, understand the clients' needs, go through every detail and plan your best.
content.Infrastructure: Experience is above average, and you can experience a different environment as a designer. There is no canteen in the institute, but there are lots of shops near by.

reviews.review_text:
All facilities are available in college like Wi-Fi, labs etc.  In our course department, we have Wi-Fi, labs and library .
