reviews.review_text: Infrastructure were awesome. We have 4 lecture room and 2 computer laps providing each computer for one student. Every room was equipped with projector. All the rooms had Air Conditioner. Most class was taken with practicals and class work.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IVS School of Design, Preet Vihar.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided complete practical & theoretical setup like advanced classrooms and hi-tech computer lab. It was such a great experience, and full of technic, methods & challenges which take u deep inside the world of architectural and interior design.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you to opt for IVS School Design if you want to improve your career better.
reviews.review_text: All the needed facilities are provided on the campus by IVS School of Design. Our college has a huge number of classrooms, and there are all kinds of equipment for interior design study. There are very good staff members. Our college is very good in conducting extracurricular activities also.

reviews.review_heading: There were good placements in 2015 and really good infrastructure and facilities..
reviews.review_text: Everything was excellent, especially our facilities and classrooms. Labs are very good with the latest technologies and quite updated when I passed out. Medical facilities are very good. Every year our college celebrates sports day, and we participate in different types of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good experience. Good college to opt for education.
reviews.review_text: Everything was simple and good, quite updated since I passed out. Good medical facilities. Sports day and other activities were organized. Helpful staff and properly ventilated studios. They have fixed accessory table to work on, which means the student doesn't need to spend extra on them.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy to join in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are separate labs to work in where the students can sit and work. The college also organises the sports meet and other programs which are helpful for the interaction with students and teachers. They take students to site visits and exhibitions, which improves the visualisation skills of a student.

reviews.review_heading: The best part of IVS is the best faculty. Learning is fun here. Many opportunities are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is okay. Classrooms are huge. There are 2 labs in IVS. One is huge, and the other is small. Wi-Fi facility is not available, but it will not create any problem because nowadays, everybody has mobile data. Canteen facility is not available in the institute. However, there are ample options available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for an interior design institute, IVS School of Design is the one.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the classrooms are very well-designed. A computer lab is available to conduct software classes, and the internet facility is provided for research work. There is no canteen, but as it is on the main road and near to the metro station, food is easily available.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with all the aspects of our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi facilities are also available here. We have huge classrooms, and there are two labs for software work. They provide adjustable tables and chairs so that students can work easily on their sheets. The quality of all the amenities provided here are good. I have not faced any problem here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the teaching methodology and campus environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the institute is good as compared to other interior designing colleges. Classrooms are well-designed, but in some classrooms, the lighting is not that good. The institute also has a nice library where we can study nicely and peacefully. The college also provides us with medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has provided many best opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The environment of college is quite pleasant. They provide many facilities like computer labs, proper air-conditioning classrooms, free Wi-Fi, designing studios etc. There are no issues regarding the infrastructure of the college. The workers provide a very habitable and hygienic environment.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, good placements and facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like free Wi-Fi, computer labs, designing studios and a library.  All the systems in the lab are working, and there is no such problem. The campus offers a working and habitable environment. We have never faced any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

college_info.college_name: Sandip University, Madhubani: Placement, Courses, Fees, Admissions 2025, Ranking

highlights.summary: The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for Sandip University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

college_info.intro:
Sandip University Sijoul, Madhubani offers BSc, BPharma and BTech as some of its popular programmes. The University offers a BSc for the duration of 3 to 4 years in full-time mode with various specialisations. Similarly, it offers BTech with various specialisations for the duration of 3 to 4 years. Sandip University course eligibility criteria includes valid scores of merit and entrance, based on which candidates will qualify for the Group Discussion and Interview round. Various UG level programmes consider 45% to 55% of minimum aggregate in Class 12. Simultaneously, various PG level programmes consider a stipulated minimum aggregate in graduation. Besides this, candidates must secure a valid score or percentile in entrance exams such as MAT/ CAT/ SAT/ GMAT/ CLAT/ SLAT/ JEE Main/ SU JEE or any other exam suggested by the University, for the chosen course. Sandip University Madhubani has a School of Engineering and Technology, Computer Science and Engineering, Commerce and Management Studies, Agriculture Science, Library and Information Science and Shri Nityanand Jha College of Education. To learn more about Sandip University Madhubani popular programmes, check out the tabulated results provided below:
Check out more on Sandip University in the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University claims an average package of 4.16 LPA and a top package of 9 LPA for its 2022 placements.They claim a 100% guaranteed job upon graduation for their "New Age MBA" programme with their placement partners.
faqs.question: Are MBA placements at Sandip University good?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University in Nashik offers all of its students 100% placement support. On its official website, the university has published the names of the branches and companies, along with the list of students placed for the 2022–2023 academic year. The top recruiters of Sandip University are:AccentureCapgeminiCognizantDatamaticsEpirocFlexDeloitteFISFlipkart
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Sandip University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Sandip University Sijoul courses are provided through 6 Schools. The University offers UG, PG and Diploma courses through School of Engineering and Technology, Computer Science and Engineering, Commerce and Management Studies, Agriculture Science, Library and Information Science and Shri Nityanand Jha College of Education. Sandip University Sijoul courses are offered through merit and entrance. TUG & PG courses given by the university are MBA, MTech, BTech, BBA, BCA, Bed, etc. For specifically undergraduate courses, students should complete their HSC with an aggregate of 45% to 55%. On the other hand, for the PG courses, a student should hold an accepted bachelor’s degree with a minimum aggregate of 60%. Once a student has completed the basic eligibility, they need to appear in an accepted entrance exam, such as JEE Main, CAT, MAT, GMAT, EMAT, etc., as it depends on the course.
Sandip University Madhubani fee structure for all the courses ranges between to For more details of Sandip University courses, eligibility and fees, check out the table given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University Madhubani is not very difficult to get admission at. The University gives admission based on merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum of 50% aggregate in Class 12 and qualify from PUC/ ISC/ CBSE or any equivalent board exam. Sandip University Sijoul considers valid entrance exam scores of JEE Main for BTech and CAT/ MAT/ SAT/ GMAT/ EMAT for MBA. The shortlisted candidates further qualify for group discussion and personal interview which becomes the final criteria for admission.
faqs.question: Is Sandip University Madhubani hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University, Madhubani fee structure entails several components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess fees and other security deposits. The University offers BSc, BTech, MBA, PhD and more, within the range of INR 22 K to INR 5.6 Lacs of total tuition fees. Some components are covered in one-time fees and some are covered in semester-wise fees that are to be paid during and after admission to any course.
faqs.question: How costly is Sandip University, Madhubani?

faqs.answer: A:    The tuition fees for B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering is INR 1.05 Lakh per year. However, candidates must note the other expenses apart from the tuition fees, that are a part of the fee structure such as the one time fees for forms, prospectus and hostel security deposit. Additionally, the fee structure includes expenses of some other components such as hostel fees, uniform cost, university caution money and a few more.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BTech in Sandip University?

faqs.answer: A:    Sandip University Madhubani M.Tech in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering) is a 2 year PG degree offered in full-time. The University provides an annual intake of 18 seats 2 with a total course fees of INR 2.58 Lakh. The MTech in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering) fee structure includes components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and other one-time fees that a candidate will have to incur.
faqs.question: How many seats does Sandip University, Madhubani offer for M.Tech in Civil Engineering (Transportation Engineering)?

reviews_list.review_title: This review is thoughtful and honest.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very few at this college, and placements are done by very local companies just for the sake of name and package. A person is given 15 to 20 thousand rupees per month to take admission in this college after thinking carefully.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is nothing in the name of infrastructure at this college. It is still a developing college that takes admission into this college after thinking carefully.
review_content.Faculty: The quality of faculty provided in this college is very poor, and there is no teaching. If you take admission to this college after thinking carefully, you will have to study on your own and pay more attention to self-study, otherwise, nothing can happen to you.

reviews_list.review_title: Student at Sandip University.

review_content.Placements: The highest and average salary packages offered by recruiters are 18.5 lakhs and 4.5 lakhs per annum, respectively. Our college placement team put in 100 percent of their hard work to give 100 percent placement results. The maximum package offered for students who are doing internships was 30,000 rupees per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available on our college campus. And our college supports various modes of transportation. There is an enhanced free wi-fi connection available in our college at all times. And all the medical emergencies available within our college campus.

individual_reviews.title: My college is very bad at everything, and faculty members are also not qualified.

content.Placements: In the last, about 30% of students get placement in my course. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Sandip University?
faqs.answer: Students at Sandip University in Nashik receive 100% aid in placement. On its official website, the university has published the list of students placed, together with the names of the branches and companies, for the academic year 2022–2023. The Sandip University placement effort involves over 200 firms, including KPIT, LTI, Atos Syntel, Mphasis, Jaro Education, IndiaMART, Amazon, Flipkart, and Zensar. The highest package offered at Sandip University is: As per the placement report of Sandip University, Nashik, the highest domestic package offered was INR 28 LPA and the highest international package offered was INR 112 LPA .

Wipro, Amazon, L&T Technology Services, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, Byju's, Deloitte, and ITC Limited are a few more of the leading employers at Sandip University.

faqs.question: How costly is Sandip University?
faqs.answer: The cost of studying at Sandip University varies depending on the program you choose. However, the university has a very uniform fee structure, with hostel fees of Rs. 70,000 per year and a refundable deposit of Rs. 5000. Gym fees are also Rs. 5000 per year. B.Tech: Rs. 50,000 per year BCA: Rs. 50,000 per year BBA: Rs. 48,000 per year MBA: Rs. 45,000 per year MCA: Rs. 48,000 per year M.Tech: Rs. 45,000 per year Agriculture: Rs. 45,000 per year

faqs.question: How costly is Sandip University, Madhubani?
faqs.answer: Sandip University, Madhubani fee structure entails several components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess fees and other security deposits. The University offers BSc, BTech, MBA, PhD and more, within the range of INR 22 K to INR 5.6 Lacs of total tuition fees. Some components are covered in one-time fees and some are covered in semester-wise fees that are to be paid during and after admission to any course.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at Sandip University?
faqs.answer: An MBA at Sandip University in Nashik costs between INR 2.48 Lacs and INR 4.90 Lacs in total tuition. Fees for several MBA specialties are as follows: INR 2,55,000 per year for an MBA in Banking and Financial Services. MBA with a Human Resource Management Specialization: INR 1,30,000 per year MBA with a Financial Management Specialization: INR 1,30,000 per year MBA with a Marketing Management Specialization: INR 1,30,000 per year During Sandip University Placements 2023, the average package provided was INR 12 LPA, while the maximum package offered was INR 28 LPA. For the academic year 2023-24, the hostel costs are INR 95,000, with a one-time security deposit of INR 5,000.

college_info.college_name: Sandip University, Madhubani Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Sandip University, Bihar provides financial relaxation through the scholarships offered based on the eligibility of merit and sports. The University offers a relaxation in tuition fees by the range of 25% to 100%. Candidates securing 70% to 79.99% and above in the qualification exam are eligible for a 25% waiver in the tuition fees. Similarly, candidates securing 75% to 79.99% or above in the qualification exam are eligible for 50% waiver in tuition fees. For a 100% waive off in tuition fees, candidates must secure 80% or above in the qualifying exam. Apart from this, a 2% candidates of the total intake are eligible for a sports scholarship.

The cost of studying at Sandip University varies depending on the program you choose. However, the university has a very uniform fee structure, with hostel fees of Rs. 70,000 per year and a refundable deposit of Rs. 5000. Gym fees are also Rs. 5000 per year.

Sandip University, Madhubani fee structure entails several components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, medical insurance, mess fees and other security deposits. The University offers BSc, BTech, MBA, PhD and more, within the range of INR 22 K to INR 5.6 Lacs of total tuition fees. Some components are covered in one-time fees and some are covered in semester-wise fees that are to be paid during and after admission to any course.

Sandip University does not offer a guaranteed 100% scholarship for its MBA program. Sandip University scholarships vary based on merit and eligibility. B.Tech in Computer Science offers a 100% tuition waiver for Maharashtra students scoring 90% or above, while out-of-state students need 80% or above for the same benefit. Remember, criteria and value change depending on the programme and your state of residence In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more

highlights.summary: CMJ University admissions 2025 are open for various courses. Students can apply online by visiting the official website.

college_info.intro:
CMJ University popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions. BTech students can become Engineers, Software Developers, or can go for various other job profiles relevant to their field. The university follows outcome-based education (OBE) framework. The university follows a teaching-learning process.
BTech and BSc students can go for MTech and MSc programmes. Overall, it is one of the best universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the CMJ University courses and their respective eligibility and CMJ University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates do not require appearing for JEE Main for admission at CMJ University. The university offers admission to BTech course based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects are offered admission in the BTech programme.
faqs.question: Does CMJ University accepts JEE score?

faqs.answer: A:    To join CMJ University, candidates need to follow the admission procedure mentioned on the university's website. CMJ University conducts its own entrance exam for various courses, and group discussions and personal interviews are taken for admitting students in MBA and M.Phil courses. Each course has its own eligibility conditions which are stated in the prospectus. Candidates with marks more than 80% in the 10+2/Graduation can apply for admissions directly. CMJ University is recognised by the University Grants Commission, and its degree is recognised for government jobs all over India
faqs.question: Can I join CMJ University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    The aspirants who are graduates from recognised universities in any stream can apply for MBA at CMJ University. Candidates must have the mark sheet and pass certificate with them. It has to be submitted at the time of form filling and admission for verification purposes. Hence, aspirants shall keep the original and copies handy with them.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get into MBA course of CMJ University?

faqs.answer: A:    CMJ University offers merit-based admission to its BPharm course. Hence, a cutoff list is not prepared by the university. However, a merit list can be published to declare names of the selected students. These candidates are called for counselling and document verification. The merit list is made as per the applicants performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: CMJ University is the best For MCA.

content.Placements: CMJ University provides 90% placement. Top companies such as Infosys, and TCS come for placement. The highest package is 80 LPA. Almost 90% students get internships from CMJ in Infosys, TCS, and many other big companies.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides facilities like the library, big classrooms, and computer labs. The College library provides many books to the students. Hostel fees is 40000 per year and mess food is not bad. Sports tournaments are conducted every year and many students participate in the events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college is CMJ university.

content.Placements: Above 50 Students get admission to my course. The highest package was 30lacks and lower was 9lacks and the top company was tata, the internship was compulsory for all, top roles as a system support engineer and all roles were depends on the company and its working profile.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was not too good, its level was moderate, but the hostel and library were very good, all teachers were highly qualified, and all students have also supported by all teachers during the class, I think this was very good in old college, I think it's enough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Apple, Reliance, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are spacious with a well-ventilated system and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and affordable. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: You can join our university to get better placements and have a successful future.

content.Placements: About 85% to 95% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary package offered by companies was 6 LPA to 7 LPA and the lowest was 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Samsung, Flipkart, Apple, etc., are some major companies that recruited students from our college.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms were huge. They had air conditioning and projectors. There was also a huge library with high-speed internet. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of food items at affordable prices.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied to be a student of this college.

content.Placements: There are 50 students in our mechanical branch in our college. Our lecturers and mentors guide all students. Our college provides various campus placements for students. I am also working in Honda now, in which I was selected by campus placements. In terms of placements, our college is the best.
content.Infrastructure: There are 200 beds for boys and 100 beds for girls in our college hostel. I am a day scholar, so I do not know much about the hostel. However, I know somewhat that the food served in our hostel is quite good. The restrictions are strictly followed.

admission_overview.college_name: CMJ University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: CMJ University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts its own entrance exam for the various courses.CMJ Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Science, Management, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

The university offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form. Below areCMJ University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
CMJ University admissionsare held twice a year. Every year, the spring sessions start in January and the fall session in July. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: CMJ University Application Process 2025
Candidates can download the application form or collect the same from the campus. Aspirants need to fill out the details in the application form and pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

CMJ University conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for professional courses. Selected aspirants have to further appear for GDPI for MBA, MPhil, BTech and MTech courses. Besides, the selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Such candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay theCMJ University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

The university has fully furnished and cozy hostels having total capacity of nearly 500 students. The calm serene tranquil atmosphere of hostel guided by discipline plays a key role in student's personality development because they find time to spend with him.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Classrooms are spacious with a well-ventilated system and equipped with digital projectors for presentation. A huge library is available for students. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and affordable. They provide a variety of food items at affordable prices. Food delivery is also available.

reviews.review_heading: You can join our university to get better placements and have a successful future.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were huge. They had air conditioning and projectors. There was also a huge library with high-speed internet. The canteen and mess facilities were also good. They served a variety of food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied to be a student of this college.
reviews.review_text: There are 200 beds for boys and 100 beds for girls in our college hostel. I am a day scholar, so I do not know much about the hostel. However, I know somewhat that the food served in our hostel is quite good. The restrictions are strictly followed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institution for computer science.
reviews.review_text: It provides a hostel facility for the students. The food served in the hostel was hygienic and healthy. All things were well-organised in our hostel. Rules and regulations were strictly followed, which was a good sign.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sant Baba Bhag Singh University refunds fee in case of some conditions. The refunded amount depends on the withdrawal time. Below are the conditions under which refund is offered to students:90% fee is refunded if the student applies before the last date of admission80% fee is refunded if the student applied within 15 days, after the last date of admission50% of fee is refundable in case where student applied after more than 15 days and less than 30 days
faqs.question: Does Sant Baba Bhag Singh University refund fees?

faqs.answer: A:    Sant Baba Bhag Singh University admissions are merit-based for all UG and PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for PhD programme. Aspirants with UGC NET, GATE, SLET (Punjab only) or NET are exempted from appearing for the university entrance exam. PhD Entrance Test is usually conducted in June and candidates can register online for the exam.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sant Baba Bhag Singh University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Sant Baba Bhag Singh University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Since the admissions are merit-based, candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Below is SBBSU eligibility for top courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 in relevant subjectsMBAGraduation in any stream with at least 50% aggregateMCABCA or BSc (Computer Science) or BSc (Information Technology or any graduation with Computer Science as a subject with at least 60% aggregateBCAClass 12 or its equivalent exam in any streamBBAClass 12 or its equivalent exam in any stream

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This university is great.

review_content.Placements: More than 60% of the students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is 2 - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Shopping Minds, Solitaire Infosis, Teach Cadd, etc. Almost 80% of the students got the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our university, the infrastructure is great and facilities are available for all the students and teachers, but hostel services and facilities are not that great. The hostel food is very basic and the same items are repeated every week. All types of sports and games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Hotel Management and Catering Technology (BHMCT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A hostel is not recommended.

review_content.Placements: More than 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course ranges from 2-3 LPA and the average package offered in our course ranges from 1-1.5 LPA. The top roles offered in our course are chief, bartender, serviceman, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our department is average. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and well-settled classrooms are also present for students. The infrastructure of our hostel is not that great, and it is below average. The food is not good.

review_summary.college_name: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I do not recommend this college to others.

content.Placements: In our course, 50% or a few students get placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is around 4 LPA and the average package offered in our course ranges from 1-2 LPA or less. The top roles offered in our course are web developer, full stack developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our university is very bad as well as the management. Wi-Fi is present in our university and hostel but it's very slow and barely works. Labs are present in our university but a majority of computers do not work and others are very slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University, Jalandhar, is good.

content.Placements: Around 70–80% of students are placed, with the highest package of 10 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and an average of 4.5 LPA. The top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Capgemini. 60% of students secured internships at companies like Cognizant, HCL, and startups, mainly in roles such as software developer, analyst, and QA engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a decent library. Facilities support practical learning, though some equipment may be outdated. The hostel rooms are basic but livable, with average food in the mess. Medical help is available on campus, and the college has good sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This university is great.

content.Placements: More than 60% of the students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is 2 - 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Shopping Minds, Solitaire Infosis, Teach Cadd, etc. Almost 80% of the students got the internship.
content.Infrastructure: In our university, the infrastructure is great and facilities are available for all the students and teachers, but hostel services and facilities are not that great. The hostel food is very basic and the same items are repeated every week. All types of sports and games are available.

admission_process.title: ant Baba Bhag Singh University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University admissionsare primarily merit-based. The university conducts an entrance exam for PhD programme.Sant Baba Bhag Singh Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Law, Humanities, Science, etc. The university offers these courses through 14 departments. Interested candidates can apply online or offline forSBBS University admissions.

SBBS University offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates can collect the form and prospectus offline from the campus or apply online for their preferred programme. Below are key highlights for Sant Baba Bhag Singh University:
Particulars
SBBS Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & PhD
UG courses:INR 81,000 - INR 77 lakh
PG courses:INR 48,700 - INR 2 lakh
How to apply?
https://sbbsuniversity.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Sant Baba Bhag Singh University offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility requirements for admission. Below are popular SBBS University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Sant Baba Bhag Singh University fee is a sum of semester and admission fees. Candidates need to pay admission fee only once after the selection process is over. The semester fee will be paid after the completion of each semester. Below areSBBS University feefor top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SBBS University admissions are conducted both in online and offline mode. Candidates need first choose the course of their choice and fulfil its selection and eligibility requirements for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in Sant Baba Bhag Singh University:
STEP 1: SBBS University Application Process 2025

Candidates can get the prospectus and application form from the university campus or apply online on the official website of SBBS. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 via DD for offline submissions.
STEP 2: Selection
Applicants are shortlisted for all UG and PG programmes based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to PhD programme.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection process is over, admission team of the university sends a confirmation mail to the selected candidates. Such aspirants will need to pay the requisite fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University offers a four-year BTech programme divided into four semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering,Mechanical Engineeringand Civil Engineering. Candidates who have passed Class 12 can apply for any of the BTech specialisations. The selection for BTech course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the B.Tech at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 12 withPhysicsand Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of theChemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science/ Information Technology / Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies with at least 45% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) can apply for Sant Baba Bhag Singh University BTech courses. However, the minimum aggregate requirement may vary from one course specialisation

faqs.question: What is the fees for BTech at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sant Baba Bhag Singh University BTech isINR 3.2 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Aspirants need to pay fee at the time of admission and semester-wise. Besides, aspirants also need to pay a fee in the start to fill out the application form. The application fee for SBBSU admissions isINR 1,000.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University offers four-year BTech course divided into four semesters. Candidates after completing Class 12 can apply for BTech specialisations. Below are the BTech specialisations offered at SBBSU:Computer Science EngineeringElectrical EngineeringMechanical EngineeringCivil Engineering

faqs.question: How much is the Sant Baba Bhag Singh University BTech application fees?

courses_data.name: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. Aspirants who have completed graduation in any stream with at least 50% aggregate can apply for MBA course. The course curriculum of MBA includes the concept of Business Laws, Applied Statistical analysis techniques, focused entrepreneurship theory and specific disciplines of Finance, Marketing, etc.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University offers two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The course curriculum of MBA includes the concept of Business Laws, Applied Statistical analysis techniques, focused entrepreneurship theory and specific disciplines of Finance, Marketing, etc. Candidates who have completed graduation in any stream with at least 50% aggregate can apply for MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the fees for MBA in Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sant Baba Bhag Singh University MBA isINR 1.6 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay fee at the time of admission and semester-wise. Besides, aspirants also need to pay a fee in the start to fill out the application form. The application fee for SBBSU admissions is INR 1,000.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University admission to MBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to pass graduation in any stream with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBA course. Aspirants who apply online will get confirmation mail after completion of the selection process. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the uiversity.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Yes the admission process is simple. Complete the application form found in the brochure. Affix copies of the documents that have been self-attested. Deliver the filled-out Admission Form to the SBBSU admissions office. The student's eligibility will be verified by the admissions staff. If the procedure is completed online, an email confirmation will be sent by the admissions desk. The fees are to be paid accordingly if selected.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sant Baba Bhag Singh University for admission?
faqs.answer: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University admissions are merit-based for all UG and PG courses. The university conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for PhD programme. Aspirants with UGC NET, GATE, SLET (Punjab only) or NET are exempted from appearing for the university entrance exam. PhD Entrance Test is usually conducted in June and candidates can register online for the exam.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for admission to Sant Baba Bhag Singh University. The seats for PhD programme is filled based on the entrance exam score. The university conducts an entrance exam to select candidates for PhD courses. Aspirants with a validUGC NET/GATE/ SLET (Punjab Only) and those who appeared in NET are exempted.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sant Baba Bhag Singh University admissions are currently open. Candidates can apply online or collect the application offline from the campus to apply for admissions. The selection for all the UG and PG courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The entrance exam scores are considered for admission to PhD course.

faqs.question: What is the Sant Baba Bhag Singh University selection criteria for BBA?
faqs.answer: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University select students for the BBA programme on a merit-basis. Hence, the applicants performance in Class 12 or equivalent examination is evaluated. There is no entrance score requirement. The candidates seeking admission must meet the below-mentioned criteria:Class 12 or equivalent pass with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates).

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech Civil Engineering students at Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: At Sant Baba Bhag Singh University (SBBSU) in Jalandhar, Punjab, the average package for B.Tech civil engineering students is approximately INR 3.5 LPA, while the maximum package is INR 7 LPA. Top companies are invited by the university's placement department to campus placements to provide chances for qualified students. However, the starting salary for B.Tech Civil Engineering (Lateral Entry) graduates can vary from INR 3-6 LPA depending on the industry and job role. In addition you can read the college reviews from our website to learn more

faqs.question: What are the government job options available after an MBA from SBBS University?
faqs.answer: There are various job opportunities for Sant Baba Bhag Singh University MBA graduates in the government sector. With a government job, individuals get job security, stability, and a suitable balance between work and family life. Some of the pouplar MBA career trends in the government sector are as follows: Economist through the Indian Economic Service (IES) Examination Reserve Bank of India Grade B Officer Staff Selection Commission Officer Probationary Officer for Government Banks IAS, IPS, and IFS through the entrance exam UPSC CSE NOTE : The aforementioned data is as per the various sources. It is still subject to change.

faqs.question: What are the government job options after BCom from Sant Baba Bhag Singh University?
faqs.answer: Yes, SBBS University BCom graduates can apply for jobs in the government sector. However, the respective selection procedure has to be passed for the same. The degree holders must have relevant skills and hence, knowledge of Commerce , Economics, Finance and related subjects is required. Mentioned below are some top job profiles along with the average salary package: Job Profile Average Salary Bank Probationary Officer (PO) INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA IBPS PO INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RBI Assistant/Grade B Officer INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA NOTE: The above-mentioned are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may differ.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend this college to others.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very bad as well as the management. Wi-Fi is present in our university and hostel but it's very slow and barely works. Labs are present in our university but a majority of computers do not work and others are very slow.

reviews.review_heading: Sant Baba Bhag Singh University, Jalandhar, is good.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a decent library. Facilities support practical learning, though some equipment may be outdated. The hostel rooms are basic but livable, with average food in the mess. Medical help is available on campus, and the college has good sports facilities for both indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: This university is great.
reviews.review_text: In our university, the infrastructure is great and facilities are available for all the students and teachers, but hostel services and facilities are not that great. The hostel food is very basic and the same items are repeated every week. All types of sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: A hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is average. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, and well-settled classrooms are also present for students. The infrastructure of our hostel is not that great, and it is below average. The food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: A hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is average with facilities such as WiFi a library, and well-equipped classrooms available for all students. However, the hostel infrastructure is below average, and the food quality is also lacking.

reviews.review_heading: Staying in the hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is average, and facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, and well-settled classrooms are also available for all the students. The infrastructure of our hostel is below average, and the food quality is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel is not recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is average; Wi-Fi, labs, library, and well-settled classrooms are also present in our department for the students. The infrastructure of the hostel is not great. The food quality of the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend this university to those students who can’t afford higher education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is average. Wi-Fi, labs, library, and well-settled classrooms are also available for the students. The infrastructure of the hostel is not that great, it’s below average, and the food is not that great. The same items are repeated every week.

reviews.review_heading: This university is recommended.
reviews.review_text: In our university, the facilities for students are very limited. The infrastructure is very basic. Hostel is not that good, and the food quality is very poor. The same menu is repeated every week and not changed even a single time. Sports and games are also limited.

reviews.review_heading: College is not good. Placement is very bad, they don't care about you.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very bad, and their facilities are also very bad, not quite good. If you want to take admission, then please check all the information about the college, reach the professor, and then make sure to take admission, then no one will complain about it.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend it for those who are serious about their future.
reviews.review_text: The university infrastructure is not that great. It is kind of poor. Facilities for students are very limited. Hostel facilities are very poor. The food is not very great with the same items repeated every week.

reviews.review_heading: The Infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is not very great and is below average. There are very few facilities available for students. Hostel facilities are not that good. The food is very basic, with the same dishes repeated every week.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and campus are not that good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is not that much good, not even the campus. The facilities in our university are very limited. Even the hostel facilities and infrastructure are not very good. They repeat the same menu every week and do not even change a single dish.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, management is very poor.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our university are very poor. The speed of Wi-Fi is very poor, we get barely 1-2 Mbps speed. Classrooms are not well-organised. The mess and its food are average. Canteen food is not that good and we get a charge extra than the MRP for some items.

reviews.review_heading: The management of our university is very poor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is not that great, and Wi-Fi is poor. Hostel facilities are below average. Bathrooms are too dirty. The mess food is tasteless, and the management is poor. There are too many irrelevant rules that students have to follow.
